note: Handoff owns capturing the current session's full context into a durable .marvin/handoff/ doc + a paste-ready prompt to resume in a fresh session. Near-misses lean on end-of-work / summary / continue-later vocab but belong to task-summary, task-deliver, commit, or the handoff-LIST read path. mock_rate encodes the IDEAL outcome for `--decider mock`; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: create a handoff for this work before I log off
I'm out of time today — hand this off so I can pick it up tomorrow in a fresh session
prep context for the next session, we're mid-way through the auth refactor and I don't want to lose the thread
write up everything a new chat would need to continue this — decisions, files, next steps
marvin hand off this session, my context window is nearly full
I'll continue this later — save the state so I can resume from scratch
продолжить в новой сессии — собери контекст
we're wrapping up phase 1 of the migration, capture where we are so someone else can take over
dump a durable brief of this whole session into .marvin/handoff so the next agent isn't blind
generate a continuation prompt I can paste into a new session tomorrow morning
list the handoff docs we've saved so far
queries.note: read path → handoff-list, not the capture skill

queries.text: what's in .marvin/handoff/003-auth-refactor.md?
queries.note: read an existing file → plain Read / handoff-list, not authoring one

queries.text: summarize the finished task — criteria, gates, commits, links
update CLAUDE.md with what we learned in this session
queries.note: session learnings into project memory → revise-claude-md

queries.text: ship it — commit and open the PR now that verify passed
save my progress to git before I break for lunch
queries.note: persist to git → commit, not a session handoff doc

queries.text: write a handover runbook for on-call engineers rotating onto this service
queries.note: operational docs deliverable → documentation-writer / readme, not a session-continuation handoff

queries.text: schedule a daily 9am agent to check the deploy status
do a reflective pass over my memory files and merge the duplicates
generate release notes summarizing what changed this sprint
queries.note: 'summarize what we did' but for a release → changelog

queries.text: we're pausing here — write up the full context so a fresh session can continue, don't just list what's done
queries.note: shares 'summarize the work' vocab with task-summary but the ask is a session-continuation brief → handoff wins

queries.text: capture this session's state so I can resume it tomorrow, and give me a prompt to paste into the new chat
queries.note: 'save state' overlaps commit, but the deliverable is a continuation doc + paste prompt → handoff beats commit

queries.text: the task is done and verified — summarize the delivery: acceptance criteria, gate results, and commits
queries.note: delivery digest → /marvin:task-summary (a tool action, not auto-invocable); handoff must abstain

queries.text: wrap up this task — commit the changes and open the PR
queries.note: 'wrap up' but the action is commit+PR delivery → task-deliver must win
